content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1434: Invincible Might from the Sky!

Translator: Sigma_ Editor: SSins

Boom! Boom!

The dark and grumbling thunder boomed on the light curtain and sparked brilliant lights everywhere.

The light curtain didn’t have a scratch.

Telika’s face was dark and sinister, talking. “What was that?”

On the other side, Batum was like a mad dog. His entire body was a straight sword thrusting into the light curtain above their heads. He had pounded on the curtain until his head bled.

Farlow, Yerburgh, and Ling Mei were hovering aside. The Black Guards of the Mysterious Sky Clan looked at the sky, their faces stern.

After they had left the area that had the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, they understood each other well enough not to part. They gathered and tried to get out of this Absolute Beginning vestige to return to the Sea of Annihilation.

Ming Hao and the God Lord’s intimidation had scared them. When they saw Shi Yan’s power Upanishad devour Gan Fu, they finally collapsed.

They finally noticed that with their power, it was impossible to rob the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. Ling Mei and Batum were resolute warriors. Seeing that they couldn’t change the situation, they immediately changed the plan.

They understood that as long as they got rid of this light barrier and reported to their seniors in the clans, those real experts would come immediately!

The Seven Great Clans knew about the legends of the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. However, until now, no clan had ever had a complete tower.

To vie for the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, those Territory Ancestor Realm experts weren’t going to hesitate to pay any price!

The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower could produce the Absolute Beginning Original Symbol that had the Ultimate power Upanishad, the supernatural power. From this aspect, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was even more precious than an Absolute Beginning divine weapon!

“As long as we escape this area and release the news, none of them can run away,” said Ling Mei.

The others nodded in agreement.

Batum’s God power surged. His body turned slightly transparent. He moved forward, his two hands creating a great storm, hitting the light curtain.

The curtain light was still closed.

Ling Mei and Farlow became serious. “It’s not good if we continue that way. If we consume more energy, once they chase us here, it’ll be a lot of trouble,” said Ling Mei.

“Do you have any suggestion?” Farlow knitted her brows.

“Although we’ve assigned Batum to break the light curtain, we can’t stay idle. I’m sure they will come after us,” Ling Mei wore a cold face. “I’m sure we will have a bloody battle soon. We should prepare from now on. Yeah, from this area, we’re going to set up as many barriers, formations, and restrictions as we can...”

Taking a deep breath, she continued, “If we can’t avoid it, we must risk our life once. If we’re well prepared, we can take the upper hand first!”

Farlow nodded. “True, I support your idea. We should carry it out immediately!”

Batum, you try to deal with that light barrier. We’re going to implement our plan now.” Ling Mei lifted her head to notice Batum and then shouted, commanding her Black Guards, Telika, Yerburgh, and Farlow. From where they were staying as the center, they set up and expanded many barriers.

Halos, lightning walls, and lakes appeared in the massive ruins. Ling Mei, Farlow, and the others moved around, urging their powers and using so many secret treasures to set up traps.

———————————-

“Over there!” In the middle of the ruins, Ming Hao rose one hand and pointed in one direction. He said darkly, “They’re setting up defensive barriers and restrictions. It seems like they want to fight against us with their lives.”

“Yeah, I think they’ve recognized that they can’t get out and they can’t avoid this bloody battle. That’s why they decided to use all that they have to see if they can kill us.” The God Lord looked indifferent, his face mocking. “They aren’t wrong and their deeds aren’t ordinary. Unfortunately, they’re too naive.”

Ming Hao and the God Lord had swaggered in this world for dozens of thousands of years. The blood that their hands bled was even more than the amount of water in the sea. They were real, great demons with absolute confidence and pride. For example, when the God Lord was at Third Sky of Immortal Realm, he had fought against Bloodthirsty at the Territory Ancestor Realm. Although Bloodthirsty had already been hurt before, his victory was still enough to prove his intimidation.

Dozens of thousands of years ago, Ming Hao, the Chief of Soul Control Force, had already had tens of thousands of clones. He had subdued and controlled the leaders of many star areas. He had single-handedly grown the Soul Control Force vigorously to resist the God Clan. Also, the God Clan had spent ten thousand years and couldn’t touch his shadow. This expert was truly sharp-witted and cunning.

Audrey floated on the massive brutal soul lotus throne. Her eyes were clear but cold. She curled the corners of her mouth as if she was angry.

While her bright eyes moved around, she often checked Shi Yan and Mei Ji. She looked more intense as her discontent was swelling in her heart.

Shi Yan and Mei Ji moved shoulder by shoulder. They were whispering as if they were talking about some deal or agreement.

“With your individual power, even if you have the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, it’s hard to create another Absolute Beginning Original Symbol. You can’t find that enormous amount of materials,” Mei Ji wore a smile on her face. She had regained her gorgeousness. “To refine an Absolute Beginning Original Symbol, it could require the experts that top one territory. The sources you have can’t do that. But our Phantom Clan can. What do you think?”

Mei Ji felt sincerely joyful.

She knew how precious the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was. If Shi Yan cooperated with the Phantom Clan and let the clan supply the materials to refine the Absolute Beginning Original Symbo, the Phantom Clan could earn something.

As Shi Yan had come from Desolate Territory, he couldn’t use billions of creatures dwelling in Desolate Territory to refine the Absolute Beginning Original Symbol. He had to depend on the big clans like one of the Seven Great Clans to do that.

Today, because Ling Mei had turned her back to him, no matter what Tu Shi Qi and Ya Yun had promised him, he couldn’t cooperate with the Mysterious Sky Clan anymore. Besides, Shi Yan had offended the Black Demon Clan, the Ancient Monster Clan, the Soul Clan, and the Devouring Clan, leaving him with only the Phantom Clan and the White Bone Clan to choose.

Mei Ji had calculated detailedly. She couldn’t hide her bright face. She believed that if her seniors knew that she could bring Shi Yan to the Phantom Clan with a complete Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, they would kick Batum away!

Compared to the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, Batum’s value was worthless. Especially in this case, Shi Yan also knew Dark Energy, which gave him a certain chance to reach the Territory Ancestor Realm...

The feeling of having a fortune fall from the sky comforted Mei Ji and made her happy. She couldn’t help but smile.

But what if they want me to be his woman to strengthen the bond? What should I do then? For the sake of the Phantom Clan, I should do that, right?

Right, for the clan. Not that I like him. Yeah, that’s true!

Mei Ji thought and suddenly felt light. She unconsciously glanced at Shi Yan and blushed. Her watery eyes were like rivers in springtime.

“Lewd!” Not far from them, Audrey observed with a cold face. Looking at Mei Ji’s mature, inviting appearance, she couldn’t help but rebuke her and pout her lips.

“Oh well, what does it have to do with you? I’m talking about something romantic and intimate with my man. What are you jealous of?” Mei Ji was content to see Audrey’s cold face. She turned around to mock Audrey.

Shi Yan had played a little bit with her name and said that she was his woman. It wasn’t something to make a fuss if she used his name to play too.

Mei Ji didn’t realize that she was discreetly satisfied when she said so.

Audrey snorted, her face cold.

Shi Yan was surprised. He couldn’t believe that the two women have chosen this time to quarrel.

Raking around, he had a good sense so he accelerated and turned into a flaming jet, heading forward.

Ming Hao halted.

The area of ruins in front of them had massive rocks floating in the air like raindrops.

Ling Mei stood right behind the rock rain curtain and faced them with strangely calm countenances.

Batum had stopped hitting the light curtain. Unexpectedly, he walked forward and said, “It was really easy when we got down here. Especially for me, I didn’t encounter any obstacle. But now, when we want to leave, we found layers of difficulties. I’ve tried every trick I know to break the light curtain up there.”

Pausing for a while, he said, “We shouldn’t fight this time. I suggest you guys spend more effort on breaking the light curtain. After that, we can fight to see who can stand until the last moment.

He had tried everything he knew. If he had successfully pierced through the light curtain, he wouldn’t have saved energy for a deadly battle.

Ling Mei looked calm, but she was actually worried. “Mei Ji, Shi Yan, it’s no use to fight here. If we can’t break it, no one can get out. Why should we kill each other?”

“It doesn’t mean we can’t break it when you couldn’t. Ling Mei, you’ve teased me. You said that the Phantom women couldn’t compare to you. Well, I want to see now if you’re really stronger than me. I was hurt and you were at your best condition at that time. Now, you got hurt too. Finally, we can have a fair game,” Mei Ji’s smile bloomed like a flower. She looked extremely comfortable.

“You damn slut! What do you think you will get if you help them?” Batum grinned fiendishly. “Once I break through to the Territory Ancestor Realm, the Phantom Clan will bring you to my door. Well, let’s see how I will play with you then!”

“Well, I’m afraid you don’t have that chance,” intervened Shi Yan.

“Because of you only?” Batum sneered.

When Mei Ji said that they could break the light curtain, Batum knew that his suggestions couldn’t work. He couldn’t move his enemies verbally.

He finally understood that the coming battle was inevitable. Almost instantly, he had made a heartless decision. He threw all the things that made him hesitant behind his head. He was ready to die in this battle.

Even if you want to get through our arrangement, you have to pay a bloody price!” Ling Mei gritted her teeth and said with a cold face, “Mei Ji, come fight me!”

“What price will we possibly have to pay?” Shi Yan felt funny.

His eyes flashed strangely. The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower emerged from his head. In just a blink of an eye, it had ballooned and become as imposing as a grand mountain.

He didn’t know the secrets of the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower and the light curtain, but he knew that they had a close relationship. He knew one thing: Under this light curtain, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower were never damaged by barriers, restrictions or formations!

Indeed, when the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower slowly landed, it hit a lightning circle first. When the first thunder sounded, the light curtain above their heads radiated a blinding light!

The intense light shot out from the sky, shining on that area with barriers and restrictions. When the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower landed, thundered boomed in that area, followed by earth-shaking explosions.

All the defenses Ling Mei and the others had set up were destroyed!
